---
title: "Test"
author: "John Doe"
format: revealjs
# incremental: true
# smaller: true
# scrollable: true
# center-title-slide: false
# theme:
# reference-location: 
# logo:
# footer: "This is a footer"
---

## Getting up

:::{.incremental}
- Turn off alarm
- Get out of bed
:::

## Going to sleep {footer=false}

- Get in bed

. . .

- Count sheep

:::{.footer}
custom footer
:::

## Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
Left column ^[A footnote]
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
Right column
:::

::: {.aside}
testing aside class
:::
::::
